Name: Sparkling Diamond Necklace and Earring Set
Description:
•Design: Classic diamond necklace and stud earrings set
•Gemstones: Diamonds ( cubic zirconia)
•Polish: Shiny
Diamonds are a popular gemstone known for their brilliance and durability. They are the hardest natural substance on Earth and are often used in engagement rings and other fine jewelry. Cubic zirconia is a man-made gemstone that is often used as a diamond simulant. It is less expensive than diamonds but can be very sparkly.his elegant rose gold plated necklace and earring set features cubic zirconia gemstones. The cubic zirconia are clear and sparkly, and they catch the light beautifully. The necklace has a delicate design with a central pendant that features a larger cubic zirconia stone. The earrings are stud earrings that also feature cubic zirconia stones.
•Design: This classic style rose gold plated diamond necklace and stud earrings set is the epitome of timeless elegance
•Gemstones: Diamonds (Zirconia). The central pendant features a larger cubic zirconia stone similarly, the stud also has zirconia stones.
•Polish: The shiny cubic zirconia are clear and sparkly, and they catch the light beautifully.

Name: Radiant Rhodium-Plated Necklace and Earring Set with Simulated Rubies
Description:
Celebrate timeless elegance and sophisticated style with this captivating necklace and earring set. Featuring stunning simulated ruby gemstones and sparkling cubic zirconia accents, all set in a gleaming rhodium finish, this set is perfect for adding a touch of glamour to any outfit. 

Ruby Allure: Immerse yourself in the fiery brilliance of simulated ruby gemstones, the centerpieces of this captivating design. 

Cubic Zirconia Sparkle: Delicate cubic zirconia gemstones add a touch of shimmering brilliance and complement the ruby gemstones beautifully. 

Rhodium-Plated Polish: The rhodium plating offers a bright, reflective finish that is more durable than sterling silver and less likely to tarnish. 

Classic Design: The timeless design of the necklace and earrings ensures this set is versatile enough for everyday wear or special occasions. 

Complete the Look: This set includes a necklace and earrings, ensuring a perfectly coordinated look. 

High-Quality Craftsmanship: Made with high-quality brass material and cubic zirconia, this set is designed to last. 

Unbeatable Value: Enjoy the luxurious look and feel of simulated gemstones and rhodium plating at an affordable price (artificial). 



Materials: Rhodium plating (over brass material ), simulated ruby gemstones, cubic zirconia gemstones 
Style: Classic, elegant 
Design: Necklace and earrings with simulated ruby gemstones and cubic zirconia accents 
Occasion: Everyday wear, special occasion

Description:
This captivating sapphire and diamond necklace and earring set adds a touch of sophistication and regality to any outfit.

Name: Enchanting Rose Rhodium and Champagne Cubic Zirconia Necklace and Earring Set (Artificial)
Description:
Radiate timeless elegance and sophisticated charm with this captivating rose rhodium and champagne cubic zirconia necklace and earring set. This dazzling set boasts shimmering simulated champagne cubic zirconia gemstones set in a gleaming rose rhodium finish, adding a touch of modern flair to any outfit.
